title: Data consistency problem of query results in the latest release of Monetdb (Remote Table)
poc: select * from AMI_test order by mesure_de;
create table AMI_test_normal as select * from  AMI_test;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results from remote table selection
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE AMI_test_extended (toc_no STRING NULL, mesure_de INT NULL, description STRING NOT NULL DEFAULT 'No description');
INSERT INTO AMI_test_extended VALUES ('A000000018', NULL, 'Second entry with NULL mesure_de');
SELECT * FROM AMI_test_extended WHERE mesure_de IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mesure_de ASC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AMI_test_extended WHERE mesure_de < 20201010 AND description LIKE 'First%';
